'''''Ull''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] that served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] attempted to destroy the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Karei]]'', sending out its complement of [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]], from [[Avenger Squadron]] and [[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]], as well as [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] for backup. At the same time, the Dreadnaught deployed its own [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[A-wing]]s to defend itself, as well as [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] serving as backup.

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome of the battle depends on the player's alignment.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
